title: Australian Sausage Bake
description: A hearty and flavorful sausage bake from down under, perfect for a cold evening. Enjoy!
instructions: In a large bowl, toss potatoes and onions with olive oil, salt, and pepper until well coated.
In a separate pan, cook Australian sausage over medium heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Place the cooked sausage in a baking dish and top with the potato and onion mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
Note: Cooking time may vary depending on your oven and the thickness of the potatoes.
